task:
Write a complete Next.js 16 Client Component at app/design-1/_components/Booking.tsx that renders the IRON design's Booking section. Output ONLY the .tsx file contents — no markdown fences, no explanation, no preamble. IMPORTANT: This component MUST start with 'use client' because it manages interactive state (selected day and time slot). Use useState from React. === AVAILABLE TAILWIND TOKENS === Colors: bg-iron-bg #0e0e0e, bg-iron-panel #171717, bg-iron-card #1d1d1d, border-iron-line #2a2a2a, text-iron-paper / text-iron-text #f4f0e8, text-iron-text-dim #9a958c, text-iron-text-muted #5e5b54, bg-iron-orange / text-iron-orange #ff5b1f, text-iron-orange-dim (not defined — use text-iron-orange for active, text-iron-text-dim for inactive). Fonts: font-iron-display (Archivo Black), font-iron-body (Archivo), font-iron-mono (JetBrains Mono). === AVAILABLE COMPONENT === import Eyebrow from './Eyebrow'; // === DATA === const DAYS = [ { label: 'MON', date: 25 }, { label: 'TUE', date: 26 }, { label: 'WED', date: 27 }, { label: 'THU', date: 28 }, { label: 'FRI', date: 29 }, { label: 'SAT', date: 30 }, ]; const SLOTS = ['6:00A', '7:30A', '12:00P', '4:30P', '6:00P']; Initial state: selectedDay=2 (WED index), selectedSlot=2 (12:00P index). === STRUCTURE === Section: border-b border-iron-line bg-iron-bg px-6 py-16 lg:px-14 lg:py-[110px]. 2-col grid (grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-[1fr_1.3fr] gap-14): Left column: - - h2 (font-iron-display text-5xl lg:text-6xl leading-[0.95] tracking-tight text-iron-paper mt-5): '45 minutes.
Zero pressure.' - p (text-iron-text-dim text-base leading-relaxed mt-6 mb-8): 'We\'ll talk through what you want, walk the space, run a quick movement screen, and you\'ll leave with a clear path forward — whether or not you sign up.' - Contact list (flex flex-col gap-3, font-iron-mono text-sm text-iron-text-dim): Each item: flex items-start gap-3. Orange arrow span (text-iron-orange) + text. Lines: '2487 Industrial Pkwy · Akron, OH 44310' '(234) 555-0119 · text or call' 'hello@nlyfit.com' Right column (picker card: bg-iron-panel border border-iron-line p-8): - Header row (flex justify-between items-center mb-5): Left: 'Pick a time' (font-iron-display text-xl text-iron-text) Right: 'MAY 2026 · WEEK 21' (font-iron-mono text-[11px] text-iron-text-dim tracking-[0.12em]) - Days grid (grid grid-cols-6 gap-1.5 mb-2): Each day button: py-3, text-center, rounded-sm, font-iron-mono text-[11px] tracking-[0.08em]. Selected (i === selectedDay): bg-iron-orange text-iron-bg. Unselected: bg-iron-card text-iron-text hover:bg-iron-line transition-colors. Inside button (two lines): day label (block), then date number (font-iron-display text-lg leading-none mt-1). onClick → setSelectedDay(i). - Sub-label (font-iron-mono text-[11px] text-iron-text-dim tracking-[0.12em] mt-5 mb-2.5): Show the full name of the selected day: ['MONDAY','TUESDAY','WEDNESDAY','THURSDAY','FRIDAY','SATURDAY'][selectedDay] + ' · MAY ' + DAYS[selectedDay].date - Slots grid (grid grid-cols-5 gap-1.5): Each slot button: py-3.5, font-iron-mono text-xs tracking-[0.06em], rounded-sm. Selected (i === selectedSlot): bg-iron-orange text-iron-bg border border-iron-orange. Unselected: bg-transparent text-iron-text border border-iron-line hover:border-iron-text-dim transition-colors. onClick → setSelectedSlot(i). - Confirm button (w-full mt-7 py-[18px] bg-iron-orange text-iron-bg font-iron-body font-bold text-sm tracking-[0.12em] uppercase hover:bg-iron-orange-dim transition-colors): Label: 'Confirm Intro Session →' Note: bg-iron-orange-dim IS defined as a token (it is in globals.css). Use it for hover. === CONSTRAINTS === - Must start with 'use client' directive — first line of file. - Imports: 'react' (useState), './Eyebrow'. - No next/image needed (no photos in this section). - Semantic HTML:
wrapper,
